description_hint: TapeTech MWS Accessory Kit TapeTech has now included a new Accessory Kit with every Wash Station purchased. The kit includes: a.
description_text: TapeTech MWS Accessory Kit TapeTech has now included a new Accessory Kit with every Wash Station purchased. The kit includes: a. Hanging Basket – to keep your already cleaned tools clean and allows them to hang to dry. Features: Hanging Basket – Allows your already clean tools to stay clean and not be put back into the basin with other tools. The basket allows for the tools to begin drying while hanging. The basket can be hung at various locations on the wash basin. Nozzle Brush – The brush simply snaps onto the end of the spray nozzle. When used in combination with the spray nozzle, the new brush helps remove stubborn compound faster. The brush also acts as a splash shield against over spray. Drain Riser – The drain riser is inserted into the metal drain in the basin and helps to prevent compound from draining into the bucket, keeping your water cleaner longer. By removing the riser, the retained compound can now be drained into a disposal bucket.

product_name: TapeTech 48" Dual Serrated Edge Magnesium Darby with Knob & Rail
description_hint: TapeTech 48" Dual Serrated Edge Magnesium Darby with Knob & Rail - EMAGDARBY48-SER TapeTech darbies quickly and efficiently smooth and compact plaster and stucc...
description_text: TapeTech 48" Dual Serrated Edge Magnesium Darby with Knob & Rail - EMAGDARBY48-SER TapeTech darbies quickly and efficiently smooth and compact plaster and stucco surfaces. TapeTech offers a smooth darby and a serrated darby. Both tools effectively knock down high spots in the material and fill low spots. The smooth darby helps to smooth and seal the plaster or stucco surface while the serrated darby creates small grooves in the surface. These grooves essentially “key” the surface to improve the adhesion of the next coat of material and introduce air to the material which accelerates the drying process. Key Features: Compacts plaster and stucco : Compresses the material to eliminate voids and improve adhesion. Smooths and levels plaster and stucco: The long, flat blade of the darby sweeps across the wet plaster or stucco material to make it level. Eliminates high spots : The darby shaves down any high spots in the plaster or stucco, leaving a flat surface. Fills low spots : Use the darby to move extra material to low spots to achieve a consistent, uniform surface. Improves adhesion : The serrated edge darby creates a textured surface that gives the next coat of material a better "key" or grip. Accelerates drying time : The serrations allow air to circulate, which helps the material dry faster, especially in cooler or more humid conditions. This allows you to get to the next coat sooner. Ergonomic Design : Ergonomic design features one knob and one handle for comfortable, all-day use and maneuverability.

description_hint: TapeTech 18V Cordless Reciprocating Insulation Saw WoolCut18-R CONVENIENT, CORDLESS, CUTS.
description_text: TapeTech 18V Cordless Reciprocating Insulation Saw WoolCut18-R CONVENIENT, CORDLESS, CUTS. The WoolCut18-R from TapeTech is a professional cordless reciprocating saw designed to quickly and efficiently provide precise cuts in mineral wool, glass wool and wood fiber panels. With the special dual-edged blades that are included with the tool, you can also cut PIR, PUR and soft wood fiber panels. The WoolCut18-R handles the toughest insulation jobs wherever needed. The cordless design provides long runtime and makes it easy to bring the tool to your workpiece, no matter where it is, on the bench, on a ladder or on scaffolding. The WoolCut18-R uses the same 18V battery platform as the other great cordless tools for EIFS and Insulation, and you can also power the tool with Bosch, DeWalt, Makita or Milwaukee batteries (using the appropriate adapter). Features: Variable speed range of 0-3,000 strokes per minute (SPM) for matching the speed of cut to the application/material ¾” stroke length Dual edge blade (one side wavy and one side serrated) in 8” and 13.8” lengths Ability to use Bosch, DeWalt, Makita, or Milwaukee batteries with the correct adapter Tool-less blade change

description_hint: TapeTech 18V Cordless Insulation Cutting Jigsaw Quickly cut insulation materials with knives, hand saws, or WoolCut18.
description_text: TapeTech 18V Cordless Insulation Cutting Jigsaw Quickly cut insulation materials with knives, hand saws, or WoolCut18. As a professional, accurately cutting insulation is a must to properly seal the structure. The ability to stand while working, secure the material in place, and cut precise angles, bevels and straight cuts is achieved by using a professional, robust, and portable insulation cutting system. TapeTech offers the only Insulation Cutting System domestically available in North America that functions with multiple insulation knife and hand saw types in addition to connecting to the TapeTech WoolCut18 cordless Insulation Cutting Saw. Features: Provides quick & efficient cuts through mineral wool, wood fiber, and pressed or unpressed PUR insulation materials. Adjusts both right and left 0-45° for miter cutting. Side-by-side stacked blade design minimizes vibration, resulting in a smoother, faster cut – take out the cutting process. Ergonomically designed handle provides a comfortable experience to reduce user fatigue and improve control cut-after-cut. Can be used with WoolCut-300 Insulation Cutting Station. Dual step “on” switch helps eliminate accidental start ups. Multi-trigger location for using in flat applications or while attached to the WoolCut-300 Insulation Cutting Station. Includes: (1) WoolCut Power Head (2) 9.45″(240 mm) wave shaped saw blades (2) 9.45″(240 mm) serrated saw blades (1) 9.45″(240 mm) blade holder (2) 13.78″(350 mm) wave shaped saw blades (2) 13.78″(350 mm) serrated saw blades (1) 13.78″(350 mm) blade holder (1) Cutting Guide with Wheels (1) Cutting guide with adjustable angle (1) Vacuum cleaner adapter (2) 4.0 Ah Li-ion Battery (1) 21V, 2.3 Ah Battery Charger (1) Heavy Duty Case

description_hint: TapeTech FINSULCUT Insulation Cutting System FINSULCUT-100 The TapeTech FINSULCUT100 Insulation Cutting Station is the most portable, versatile manual insulatio...
description_text: TapeTech FINSULCUT Insulation Cutting System FINSULCUT-100 The TapeTech FINSULCUT100 Insulation Cutting Station is the most portable, versatile manual insulation cutting system available. It securely holds and compresses fiberglass, mineral wool, wood fiber, and other insulation materials, making it easy to cut the insulation with standard insulation knives. Unlike other systems, FINSULCUT100 allows the user to stand while using the tool – no more working form your knees! No kneeling required when cutting fiberglass and mineral wool insulation. Working from your knees is not efficient or ergonomic. Cutting systems that allow the worker to stand and leverage proper body mechanics lead to better results and less repetitive motion injuries. TapeTech offers the best designed system for cutting flexible, semi-rigid, or rigid insulation materials. Features: Built-in retractable ruler for measuring and making repeatable cuts Spring loaded system easily compresses material before cutting On-board knife storage – comes with the TapeTech WoolCut16 Insulation Knife Maximum cutting dimensions of 12” High and 24.75” Wide Portable unit weighing only 10lbs Includes: TapeTech WOOLCUT16 16” Dual Edge Insulation Knife

description_text: TapeTech 18V Vibrating Wire Insulation Cutter The TapeTech WoolCut™-V500 is a versatile, 18V cordless Vibrating Wire Insulation Cutter that makes clean, precise cuts in mineral wool, wood fiber, glass fiber, sponge, EPS/XPS foam, rubber, and Plexiglas. The Vibrating Insulation Cutter makes cutting virtually any shape in materials easy, including making quick slots and cutouts. Vibrating Insulation Cutters are the fastest and most efficient way to cut rigid and semi-rigid insulations materials. They minimize dust and deliver precise, accurate cuts in multiple shapes and angles. TapeTech offers the only Vibrating Insulation Cutter available domestically in North America. Features: The WoolCut-V500 cutter can make bevel cuts between 0– 45°, and angle cuts up to 70°, making complex cuts easy, accurate and repeatable. description_hint: TapeTech 48″ Mineral Wool Shaver Eliminate uneven mineral wool surfaces. Mineral Wool has great properties for EIFS applications – high insulation values and is...
description_text: TapeTech 48″ Mineral Wool Shaver Eliminate uneven mineral wool surfaces. Mineral Wool has great properties for EIFS applications – high insulation values and is noncombustible – but has always presented a challenge for installers since it cannot be rasped or sanded to achieve the smooth, flush exterior surface required prior to EIFS, or other material, application. In response, TapeTech introduces the patented WoolShave™48 Mineral Wool Shaver. The TapeTech WoolShave™48 is the first tool specifically designed to shave the face of rigid, and semi-rigid mineral wool batts to achieve a flush surface ready for the application of EIFS. Features: Patented product 48” length for full coverage Scalloped, wavy blades for easy cutting Dual handle design for balance and comfort while using Blade guards for transport attach to the back of the tool while in use Blades are replaceable with the tool stored on the body of the WoolShave-48 Lightweight aluminum body to reduce fatigue (4.6lbs)

description_text: TapeTech 0.75" Premium Stainless Steel Joint Knife TapeTech Premium Taping and Jointing Knives feature the optimal combination of design, materials experience and testing to produce knives with the best balance, flex, comfort, and control so you achieve premium results when applying and smoothing joint compound. description_hint: TapeTech Semi-Auto Taping Tool Kit This kit is designed to dramatically boost your taping and finishing productivity compared to traditional hand taping.
description_text: TapeTech Semi-Auto Taping Tool Kit This kit is designed to dramatically boost your taping and finishing productivity compared to traditional hand taping. These semi-automatic tools improve efficiency and consistency, while minimizing material waste—saving you both time and money on every job. The included TapeTech Compound Tube allows for smooth, even application of joint compound to flat seams and inside corners. Attach the flat and corner applicators to the tube for easy, controlled compound delivery. After applying compound, use the corner roller to bed the tape securely into drywall angles. Finish with the corner flusher to achieve a clean, feathered finish in inside corners. The complete kit comes packed in a durable, custom-fit carrying case—making it easy to transport, store, and protect your tools on any jobsite. Features: Boost efficiency and reduce material waste compared to hand taping. Compound tube enables precise and even compound application. All essential tools for each step of the taping process included in one convenient kit. Custom case protects your tools and simplifies transportation. product_name: TapeTech EIFSAND 18V Cordless Sander w/ 18V Cordless Vac
description_hint: TapeTech 18V Cordless EIFS Sanding Pack The TapeTech 18V Dual Disc Sander and 18V Cordless Brushless Backpack Vacuum deliver unmatched mobility, power, and effi...
description_text: TapeTech 18V Cordless EIFS Sanding Pack The TapeTech 18V Dual Disc Sander and 18V Cordless Brushless Backpack Vacuum deliver unmatched mobility, power, and efficiency for EIFS, drywall, and foam panel applications. Designed for professionals who need cordless convenience and dust-free performance, this system is perfect for working on scaffolding or in tight spaces. The 18V Dual Disc Sander quickly sands EPS, XPS, and other materials, saving time and effort on the jobsite. Its 8" contra-rotating dual disc design ensures smooth operation and perfect balance. The independent motor mounts on your belt, reducing the in-hand weight of the sander to just 5 pounds. The brushless motor features electronic soft-start and overload protection for longer tool life and low maintenance. Continuous speed control maintains consistent RPM, even under load. The wide sanding surface creates a more uniform finish compared to standard hand rasps. Powered by two 5.0 Ah batteries, the sander can cover up to 950 square feet on a single charge. A TapeTech battery adapter (sold separately) allows you to use Bosch, Makita, Milwaukee, or DeWalt batteries—keeping you powered all day long. The integrated exhaust outlet connects easily to the TapeTech EIFSVAC18V Backpack Vacuum or other compatible vacuums to maintain a clean, dust-free workspace. The TapeTech 18V Cordless Brushless Backpack Vacuum is the ideal companion to the Dual Disc Sander, offering powerful dust collection with no cords to manage. Its 3.7-gallon capacity and 7.4 gallons-per-second max airflow make it effective and comfortable for extended use. Weighing just 14 pounds, the vacuum is worn like a backpack, allowing maximum mobility and performance on scaffolding or large job sites. Use the included batteries and quick charger or your own preferred battery brand with the TapeTech adapter system. This combo delivers the only truly cordless, dustless drywall hand sanding solution available today. description_text: TapeTech EIFS Sanding Pack The TapeTech Dual Disc Sander (EIFSAND120) is engineered to efficiently sand EPS, XPS, and other foam panels—saving time and reducing labor costs. Its 8" dual disc design features contra-rotating discs for optimal balance and smoother operation. The motor is belt-mounted, reducing tool weight in-hand to just 5 lbs for greater control and less fatigue. This professional-grade sander includes electronic soft-start, overload protection, and continuous speed control to maintain performance under load. The large sanding surface delivers a more even finish compared to standard hand rasps. description_text: TapeTech 18V Rotating Hot Knife - EHK18VROTATE TapeTech EHK18VROTATE is the most professional hot knife kit available. The EHK18VROTATE Hot Knife is the first Cordless, Air-Cooled, Rotating Head Hot Knife in the world, providing unmatched portability, versatility and function. Cut through EPS, XPS, and GPS foam with ease. Powered by a 5.0 aH 18V battery and 21V 8.0 amp fast charger, the EHK18VROTATE tool can handle any foam cutting or grooving task up to 10" (250mm) in EPS or XPS foam panels. When paired with one of four available battery adapters, the EHK18VROTATE can be powered using Bosch, DeWalt, Makita or Milwaukee batteries.

description_hint: TapeTech T-RAXX™ Taping Tool Rack System T-RAXX01 The first and only professional tool rack system designed to securely hold Automatic Taping & Finishing (ATF)...
description_text: TapeTech T-RAXX™ Taping Tool Rack System T-RAXX01 The first and only professional tool rack system designed to securely hold Automatic Taping & Finishing (ATF) tools. T-RAXX connects to the FLEX Stack Pack system—the most durable rolling toolbox system in the industry—keeping your full tool set, along with accessories, parts, and ancillary items, within reach throughout the day. No more leaning tools in the corner or piling them into tool bags and buckets. T-RAXX keeps your tools accessible on the job and moves easily from room to room when mounted to the FLEX FS1108 Roller Drawer and FS1106 Stack Pack boxes. Compatible with most ATF tool brands—even those requiring professionals to carry 10 or more individual tool cases. Note : The FLEX FS1108 Roller Drawer and FS1106 Stack Pack boxes (sold separately) are required to use the T-RAXX system, as it attaches directly to these components. Features: EXCLUSIVE: The ONLY Tool Rack System designed specifically for Automatic Taping & Finishing Tools COMPLETE SYSTEM: T-RAXX comes with 14 pieces, ready to hold your ATF tools securely and easily move from room to room on the jobsite CONVENIENT: Keeps all your ATF tools and accessories together in one, organized storage system, readily accessible throughout your workday. CUSTOM: Fits the FLEX Stack Pack tool storage system, rated the most robust and durable tool storage system. VERSATILE: Dedicated, custom holders for your larger ATF tools PLUS multiple drawers and bins for the smaller ATF tools, mixing drills, cleaning accessories, and lubricants. EXPANDABLE: Add a second T-RAXX system to the other side of your Stack Pack system to carry even more. Like Drywall Sanders, paint poles, levels, and more. Or add a second Pump Holder if you carry two loading pumps. description_hint: TapeTech 6.5" Carbon Steel Jab Saw The TapeTech 6.5" Carbon Steel Jab Saw is a heavy-duty cutting tool built for precision and durability.
description_text: TapeTech 6.5" Carbon Steel Jab Saw The TapeTech 6.5" Carbon Steel Jab Saw is a heavy-duty cutting tool built for precision and durability. Featuring an extra-thick high carbon steel blade, this saw is designed to handle the toughest materials, including drywall, PVC, and cement board, with ease. The sharpened point allows for easy puncturing, making plunge cuts a breeze, while the triple ground hardened teeth ensure fast cutting and long-lasting performance. The saw's ergonomic handle provides a comfortable, secure grip, reducing fatigue during extended use. description_hint: TapeTech 12" Premium Compound Roller 3 Pack CROLL12CG3PK TapeTech drywall joint compound rollers come in a 3 pack and, are ideal for applying large amounts of d...
description_text: TapeTech 12" Premium Compound Roller 3 Pack CROLL12CG3PK TapeTech drywall joint compound rollers come in a 3 pack and, are ideal for applying large amounts of drywall compound on walls and ceilings for finishing large patches and butt joints, or skimming entire walls, ceilings and rooms. They are a great alternative to breaking out a sprayer or trying to apply the compound with knives or trowels. Simply apply the joint compound with the TapeTech premium drywall joint compound roller and then skim the area with a TapeTech premium finishing knife for an amazing finish. Key Features: Highest Quality: TapeTech premium drywall joint compound rollers are manufactured in Europe exclusively for TapeTech, using the highest quality reticulated polypropylene nap for great results and long life. Highest Capacity: TapeTech premium drywall joint compound rollers feature an 18mm nap - nearly 50% thicker than other brands with ½” nap – allowing you to apply nearly 50% more compound to the surface between fills compared to other high nap rollers. Highest Coverage: The unique design and manufacturing of TapeTech premium joint compound rollers releases more compound from the nap and onto the surface, providing the highest coverage rate per roller load. Robust Frame Design: TapeTech premium drywall joint compound rollers are designed for use with TapeTech roller frames. Our frames are a full 5/16” thick – stronger than smaller ¼” thick frames on the market. Comfortable Handle: The TapeTech Roller frames feature a comfortable, two-component over molded handle that provides comfortable handling and positive grip, even when wet. Extended Reach: Easily reach most common walls and ceilings using the TapeTech CROLLHAN2 extendable handle. With super secure attachment and lightweight but robust construction, you’ll quickly knock out any wall coverage or skimming job. Ideal for Skimming: The TapeTech premium drywall joint compound rollers are ideal for quickly applying large amounts of compound over patches, butt joints or entire surfaces. The perfect set up for skimming with TapeTech premium finishing knives.

description_hint: The new MudRunner® Pro Extension allows the user to add 12" length to the MR01TT to reach higher spaces.
description_text: The new MudRunner® Pro Extension allows the user to add 12" length to the MR01TT to reach higher spaces. The MRX01TT simply attaches by inserting the extrusion piece into the receiving port on the MR01TT and securing the clamps. The MRX01TT also has a receiving port to add multiple extensions. The New MudRunner® Pro Extension adds up to 20% more overall length to the MudRunner® Pro when installed. Due to the installment process, the extension becomes the "on/off" twisting lever for the tool.

description_hint: TapeTech MudRunner® Pro MR01TT The new second generation MudRunner® Pro tool applies joint compound to inside and outside corners faster and with precision cont...
description_text: TapeTech MudRunner® Pro MR01TT The new second generation MudRunner® Pro tool applies joint compound to inside and outside corners faster and with precision control and minimal effort. The new MudRunner® Pro offers a tremendous update in the efficiency of finishing corners in drywall. The tool offers more versatility when needed in adjustment to length, both integrated and with the MRX01TT extension (sold separately). The new MudRunner® Pro also offers a 20% increase in piston strength for greater compound application. Adjustable Length: 52.5" - 60.5" Use With Any Inside Or Outside Corner Finisher Thicker Mud Applies Effortlessly Clear Tube For Visible Mud Level Reduces Wear-and-Tear On Your Shoulders Requires A Pump/Filler To Fill Requires An Applicator Head To Apply/Finish

description_hint: TapeTech Decorative Finish Pressure Sprayer 2L VSPRAY2L The TapeTech VSPRAY2L Decorative Finish Pressure Sprayer is the perfect complement to your TapeTech Vene...
description_text: TapeTech Decorative Finish Pressure Sprayer 2L VSPRAY2L The TapeTech VSPRAY2L Decorative Finish Pressure Sprayer is the perfect complement to your TapeTech Venetian trowels and other decorative tools as you transform another space. With its 1.8-liter capacity and adjustable spray nozzle, it’s easier than ever to keep your Venetian Plaster or other decorative materials moist and workable as you smooth, texture or burnish. Whether you need a gentle mist for a subtle adjustment or a heavier spray for thick materials, TapeTech VSPRAY2L gets the job done. All the handles and trigger feature a smooth, ergonomic design for comfortable use all day. And you won’t need to guess how much water you have left thanks to the transparent PET container. VSPRAY2L is not designed for chemicals, petroleum or gasoline. Water should be kept under 104 ° F. Key Features: Perfect for Venetian Plaster: Keep your material workable by spraying a controlled amount of water on the surface, as needed. Ideal Size: With its 1.8-liter maximum fill capacity and weighing about a pound, the TapeTech VSPRAY2L Pressure Sprayer for Decorative Finish is the perfect balance of volume and weight. Intuitive Design: The transparent PET container makes it easy to know how much water remains. Ergonomic: The main handle and pump handle fit any size hand for comfortable, all-day use. The trigger is ideally positioned to be operated with your thumb. Adjustable Spray Pattern: Control the amount of water you apply with a simple adjustment of the brass spray nozzle. Not for Caustic Liquids: Do not use with chemicals, petroleum or gasoline.

description_hint: TapeTech 12" Compound Roller FrameCCAGE12 TapeTech drywall joint compound rollers are ideal for applying large amounts of drywall compound on walls and ceilings...
description_text: TapeTech 12" Compound Roller FrameCCAGE12 TapeTech drywall joint compound rollers are ideal for applying large amounts of drywall compound on walls and ceilings for finishing large patches and butt joints, or skimming entire walls, ceilings and rooms. They are a great alternative to breaking out a sprayer or trying to apply the compound with knives or trowels. Simply apply the joint compound with the TapeTech premium drywall joint compound roller and then skim the area with a TapeTech premium finishing knife for an amazing finish. TapeTech compound rollers are designed for use with TapeTech roller frames. The shafts of our dedicated roller frames are a full 5/16” thick, providing the strongest frame in the industry – a must for this heavy-duty application. The roller and roller frames quickly and easily attach to our TapeTech model CROLLHAN2 extendable support handle (44” – 79”) to make quick work of most walls and ceilings without the need for stilts or scaffolds. Key Features: Robust Design: Features a full 5/16” thick frame design – stronger than smaller ¼” thick frames – and the most robust joint compound roller frame on the market. Comfortable Handle: The TapeTech Roller frames feature a comfortable, two-component over molded handle that provides comfortable handling and positive grip, even when wet. Highest Quality: TapeTech premium drywall joint compound rollers are manufactured in Europe exclusively for TapeTech, using the highest quality reticulated polypropylene nap for great results and long life. Highest Capacity: When matched with a TapeTech premium drywall joint compound roller, applies nearly 50% more compound to the surface between fills compared to other high nap rollers and frames. Highest Coverage: The unique design and manufacturing of TapeTech premium joint compound rollers releases more compound from the nap and onto the surface, providing the highest coverage rate per roller load. Extended Reach: Easily attaches to TapeTech CROLLHAN2 extendable handle to reach most common walls and ceilings without stilts or scaffolds. With super secure attachment and lightweight but robust construction, you’ll quickly knock out any wall coverage or skimming job. Ideal for Skimming: The TapeTech premium drywall joint compound rollers are ideal for quickly applying large amounts of compound over patches, butt joints or entire surfaces. The perfect set up for skimming with TapeTech premium finishing knives. Available in 4 sizes: TapeTech premium joint compound roller frames are available in 4-inch, 9-inch and 12-inch sizes plus an integrated 2-inch model that includes the roller and frame together.

description_hint: TapeTech featheredges are perfect for squaring up inside corners and smoothing stucco, EIFS or plaster.
description_text: TapeTech featheredges are perfect for squaring up inside corners and smoothing stucco, EIFS or plaster. Made from magnesium, the 2 mm extrusion is thicker than competitive featheredges, resulting in a more rigid plane and straighter, flatter surfaces. Comfortable H-Shape allows you to easily adjust the angle of the featheredge using just your thumb and palm. Extremely long-lasting, TapeTech featheredges include a 10mm hole to hang the tool. Available in 4', 5' or 6' lengths.

description_hint: Set consists of one each Trowel and Square Ornamental tools in sizes 3/8", 1/2", 5/8", 3/4" and 1".
description_text: Set consists of one each Trowel and Square Ornamental tools in sizes 3/8", 1/2", 5/8", 3/4" and 1". TapeTech Ornamental Tools are the ideal instrument to create ornate details on foam, concrete, plaster, stucco and other materials. The tool is made from high carbon tempered steel for long life. One end of the tool has a leaf shape and the other end features a square, expanding the versatility of shaping and smoothing material, even in the tightest spaces and corners. Decorative work is easy with TapeTech Ornamental Tools. The ergonomic shape fits comfortably in your hand and also provides clearance for your knuckles as you work.

description_text: TapeTech Blue Steel Knife Set CBSPROMOSET TapeTech Premium Taping and Jointing Knives feature the optimal combination of design, materials experience and testing to produce knives with the best balance, flex, comfort, and control so you achieve premium results when applying and smoothing joint compound. The handle’s over-sized, tapered shape provides the most ergonomic, slip-resistant grip. The enlarged, alloy hammer end allows it to be used to set protruding fasteners, adjust installation flaws, and protect against damage if the knife is dropped. TapeTech Premium Taping and Joint Knife blades are precision ground and polished to provide the perfect amount of flex and finish. The Carbon Steel and Blue Steel blades provide ultimate feel. Feature the strongest backing plate in the industry, preventing unwanted blade deflection while providing smooth, consistent control and finish. description_hint: TapeTech 3-Day Pro Skill Training Registration Check the TapeTech Training Center page for upcoming training dates.
description_text: TapeTech 3-Day Pro Skill Training Registration Check the TapeTech Training Center page for upcoming training dates. To register and pay online, choose the number of registrants you are paying for in the Quantity box above , then add this product to your cart and checkout using any available payment method. Course Overview: This course will teach the skills and techniques required to correctly and efficiently use automatic taping and finishing tools. Training Location: TapeTech National Training Center, Suwanee, GA Duration: 3 days Who should attend: Tool owners and their employees as well as authorized TapeTech Distributors and Dealers. Cost: The cost for this two day seminar is $599.00 and includes classroom and hands-on instruction, materials, lunch and snacks each day. Each attendee is responsible for his or her own transportation, lodging and other meal expenses. Day One The Finishing Process ATF Tool overview Mixing the Compound Filling the tools Using the Automatic Taper Using the Corner Roller Intro to Finishing Boxes Day Two Using the EasyClean® Box and MAXXBOX® Using the Power Assist® MAXXBOX® Nail Spotters Corner Applicators and MudRunner® Corner Finishers Common Tool Maintenance Day Three A TapeTech Training Team member will work with you to customize your agenda for your final day at the training center. Payment Information: Course fee of $599.00 per person must be paid in advance to secure your place in the session. Cancellation Policy: Cancellation must be made via e-mail sent to tapetech@tapetech.com. Cancellations received more than 30 days before the first day of session: 75% refund. Cancellations received less than 30 days before the first day of session: 50% refund. Cancellations received less than 15 days before the first day of session: no refund. Additional Information, Terms & Conditions: Successful graduates receive a Certificate of Completion and a TapeTech Polo Shirt. Certificate and polo shirt presented to actual attendees only. Cancellations not eligible for certificate or polo shirt.
features: The Finishing Process | ATF Tool overview | Mixing the Compound | Filling the tools | Using the Automatic Taper | Using the Corner Roller | Intro to Finishing Boxes | Using the EasyClean® Box and MAXXBOX® | Using the Power Assist® MAXXBOX® | Nail Spotters | Corner Applicators and MudRunner® | Corner Finishers | Common Tool Maintenance | A TapeTech Training Team member will work with you to customize your agenda for your final day at the training center. | Cancellations received more than 30 days before the first day of session: 75% refund. | Cancellations received less than 30 days before the first day of session: 50% refund. | Cancellations received less than 15 days before the first day of session: no refund.

product_name: EHKACROTATEKIT TapeTech Air-Cooled Rotating Hot Knife KIT-500
description_hint: TapeTech EHKAROTATE is the world's first Professional, Air-Cooled, Rotating Head Hot Knife.
description_text: TapeTech EHKAROTATE is the world's first Professional, Air-Cooled, Rotating Head Hot Knife. Capable of reaching operating temperatures of 932 ° F (500 ° C) in seconds, the EHKAROTATE features an adjustable head that allows the worker to position the blade in one of five positions for the most ergonomic and efficient cut. The 120V EHKAROTATE has three temperature settings and is rated for continuous operation due to the air-cooled design. EHKROTATE has a maximum cutting depth of 10" (250mm) and a convenient tool hook. EHKAROTATEKIT is a deluxe professional kit and includes EGUIDE02 Edge Guide, EGBADAPT02 Grooving Blade Adapter, ESLED02 Professional Sled with 3-piece cutting guide, Blade wrench, Scraper tool, 6" and 8" Straight Blades, EFLAT12 12" Flat Blade stock, EPG20, EPG27 and EPG34 Pipe Grooving Blades, EPLIER Premium Blade Bending Pliers, measuring tape and marker pen and robust, custom heavy-duty canvas tool bag.

description_hint: TapeTech EHWTTOP6 Tabletop Hot Wire Cutter is an extremely portable solution for cutting circles, cones and other shapes quickly in the shop or on the jobsite.
description_text: TapeTech EHWTTOP6 Tabletop Hot Wire Cutter is an extremely portable solution for cutting circles, cones and other shapes quickly in the shop or on the jobsite. This cutter is not designed for high-production use but excels when occasional circles, columns or cones are needed or when extreme portability is essential. The 16" x 24" (400mm x 600mm) table is ideal for cutting custom shapes or letters with a 0.18mm wire that heats to cutting temperature in just 1 second. The cutting angle is adjustable between 0° (90° vertical cut) and 60° to the right or left. The tool features a cutting height of nearly 9.5" and weighs under 5 pounds.

description_hint: TapeTech EHWBOW120 is a professional cordless Hot Wire Bow Cutter that quickly and easily cuts EPS or XPS foam.
description_text: TapeTech EHWBOW120 is a professional cordless Hot Wire Bow Cutter that quickly and easily cuts EPS or XPS foam. The aluminum bow is robust but lightweight and asssembles or disasembles in seconds for easy storage or transport. The Hot Wire cutting bow is for cutting EPS, XPS Styrofoam and similar insulating materials. Featuring an Air-cooled power supply, EHWBOW120 is capable of continuous use, providing portability and convenience whether cutting foam panel shapes or shaving uneven foam on facades. The hot wire is easily changed without the need for tools. Maximum length cut: 53". Maximum depth cut: 13".

description_hint: EHWTABLE60 Hot Wire Table is a professional, portable hot wire table. Featuring folding legs for easy storage and transport, EHWTABLE60 has a 24" x 48" (60cm x...
description_text: EHWTABLE60 Hot Wire Table is a professional, portable hot wire table. Featuring folding legs for easy storage and transport, EHWTABLE60 has a 24" x 48" (60cm x 120cm) table and can cut foam up to 21" tall. The robust aluminum frame adjusts between 13.8" (35cm) and 21.6" (55cm). The 0.5mm wire heats to 1022 ° F (550 ° C) in less than 10 seconds and the convenient foot switch keeps both hands free to move the foam as needed. EHWTABLE60 cuts EPS or XPS foam between 45 ° and 90 ° . The table weighs 44 pounds.

description_hint: The TapeTech EHWJS18X2 Cordless Portable Jobsite Hot Wire is the industry's most portable and versatile hot wire machine.
description_text: The TapeTech EHWJS18X2 Cordless Portable Jobsite Hot Wire is the industry's most portable and versatile hot wire machine. Ideally suited for EIFS and other foam-cutting professional, the EHWJS18X2 quickly cuts and notches EPS and XPS foam with unmatched precision. The EHWJS18X2 weighs just 44 pounds (including batteries) and sets up in under 2 minutes. It can make straight through cuts, including ripping thicker panels to thinner dimensions, miter cuts, bevel cuts, compound miters and notches in the face or end of foam panels. EHWJS18X2 includes a scaffolding strap to securely strap the unit to the railing of scaffolding and staging to prevent accidental equipment falls. The superalloy NiChrome hot wire heats to 932 ° F (500 ° C) in seconds to make any jobsite a highly productive foam-cutting environment. Features a spring-loaded safety switch. The hot wire element (EHW100) is easy to replace and requires no tools. Hot wire lasts approximately 70 hours of cutting time. Max. Cutting Height 50.8” (1290 mm) Max. Cutting Thickness 13” (330 mm) Rulers Left: 39” (1000 mm); 0-60º / Right: 15” (400 mm) Net Weight 44 pounds (20kg) Including batteries Assembled Size 63” x 17” x 8” (1610 X 440 X 200 mm) Power Supply 2x 18V 2.0Ah Batteries Replacement Hot Wire EHW100

description_hint: EHW100 is a premium quality replacement hot wire for TapeTech EHWJS100, EHWJS18X2, EHWBOW120, EHWBOW36V Hot Wire tools.
description_text: EHW100 is a premium quality replacement hot wire for TapeTech EHWJS100, EHWJS18X2, EHWBOW120, EHWBOW36V Hot Wire tools. The 0.5mm NiChrome wire is pre-cut to the proper length and has eyelets attached for quick, tool-less wire replacement.

description_hint: TapeTech Hot Knife Blades fit all TapeTech Hot Knives. Manufactured from premium quality NiChrome alloy, TapeTech Hot Knife Blades heat quickly and evenly to ma...
description_text: TapeTech Hot Knife Blades fit all TapeTech Hot Knives. Manufactured from premium quality NiChrome alloy, TapeTech Hot Knife Blades heat quickly and evenly to make clean cuts in EPS or XPS foam panels. Available in 4", 6", 8" and 10" lengths.

description_hint: TapeTech NiChromeFlat16-5 is a convenient 5-pack of high performance, 16" (406mm) NiChrome alloy flat stock used to custom bend grooving cutters for EPS and XPS...
description_text: TapeTech NiChromeFlat16-5 is a convenient 5-pack of high performance, 16" (406mm) NiChrome alloy flat stock used to custom bend grooving cutters for EPS and XPS foam. The 16" length is more suitable for larger grooving requirements and allows for longer "legs" that could provide variable groove depths of the same width. NiChromeFlat16-5 fits all TapeTech Grooving Adapters and Sleds. Packaged in reusable tubes to prevent damage to the flat stock.

description_hint: The TapeTech EBASESLED Professional EIFS Nylon Insert Sled works with TapeTech Nylon Inserts to quickly and easily embed mesh and material into EPS/XPS grooves...
description_text: The TapeTech EBASESLED Professional EIFS Nylon Insert Sled works with TapeTech Nylon Inserts to quickly and easily embed mesh and material into EPS/XPS grooves formed with TapeTech Ω-shaped grooving blades. The stainless steel sled measures 4" x 4.7" (100mm x 120mm) and features an ergonomic wood handle. The EBASESLED design prevents the sled from snagging on the mesh when embedding.

description_hint: The TapeTech EABS127-TTSM Premium ABS Float is the preferred design for EIFS. The 5" x 11" float is constructed of unbreakable ABS plastic and has rounded corne...
description_text: The TapeTech EABS127-TTSM Premium ABS Float is the preferred design for EIFS. The 5" x 11" float is constructed of unbreakable ABS plastic and has rounded corners to prevent digging or gouging. This float is "ready to go" right off the shelf. The base is textured to gently roll the corn to achieve the perfect finish every time. The handle design is preferred by professionals and the light weight makes this float comfortable for all day use.

description_hint: The TapeTech EABS127-TTTX Premium ABS Float is the preferred design for EIFS. The 5" x 11" float is constructed of unbreakable ABS plastic and has rounded corne...
description_text: The TapeTech EABS127-TTTX Premium ABS Float is the preferred design for EIFS. The 5" x 11" float is constructed of unbreakable ABS plastic and has rounded corners to prevent digging or gouging. This float is "ready to go" right off the shelf. The base of EABS127-TTTX features slightly more texture than our popular EABS127-TTSM Float to produce a more pronounced texture. The handle design is preferred by professionals and the light weight makes this float comfortable for all day use.

Handcrafted from 0.65mm stainless steel, TapeTech corner edgers are robust enough to efficiently create perfect results in thick materials. description_hint: TapeTech featheredges are perfect for squaring up inside corners and smoothing stucco, EIFS or plaster.
description_text: TapeTech featheredges are perfect for squaring up inside corners and smoothing stucco, EIFS or plaster. Made from aluminum, the 2 mm extrusion is thicker than competitive featheredges, resulting in a more rigid plane and straighter, flatter surfaces. Comfortable H-Shape allows you to easily adjust the angle of the featheredge using just your thumb and palm. Extremely long-lasting, TapeTech featheredges include a 10mm hole to hang the tool. Available in 4', 5' or 6' lengths.

Used in conjunction with TapeTech EGBADAPT01 or EGBADAPT02 Grooving Blade Adapters, the Ω-shaped design of the blade facilitates quick insertion and simple alignment of the grooving blade.

product_name: TapeTech Mesh and Building Wrap Dispenser
description_hint: The TapeTech EMESHDISPENSE Mesh and Building Wrap Dispenser quickly and easily attaches to scaffolding and swing stages to safely hold rolls of EIFS and Stucco...
description_text: The TapeTech EMESHDISPENSE Mesh and Building Wrap Dispenser quickly and easily attaches to scaffolding and swing stages to safely hold rolls of EIFS and Stucco mesh or building wraps. The metered dispenser mechanism allows you to accurately roll out the precise length of material needed, eliminating guesswork and significantly reducing waste due to overcuts. Ratched roller design elimnates backroll. The EMESHDISPENSE can help to increase safety by preventing loose rolls of mesh from falling over on scaffolds and stages and places the roll at a more ergonomic working height, eliminating the need for workers to bend to roll and cut mesh or wrap on the jobsite. Features quick and easy roll replacement and adjustable end stops for uniform dispensing of various width materials. The TapeTech EMESHDISPENSE holds rolls up to 43" wide.

product_name: TapeTech 18V Air Cooled Rotating Hot Knife Kit
description_hint: TapeTech 18V Rotating Hot Knife Kit EHK18VROTATEKIT TapeTech EHK18VROTATEKIT is the most professional hot knife kit available.
description_text: TapeTech 18V Rotating Hot Knife Kit EHK18VROTATEKIT TapeTech EHK18VROTATEKIT is the most professional hot knife kit available. The EHK18VROTATE Hot Knife is the first Cordless, Air-Cooled, Rotating Head Hot Knife in the world, providing unmatched portability, versatility and function. Powered by a 5.0 aH 18V battery and 21V 8.0 amp fast charger, the EHK18VROTATE tool can handle any foam cutting or grooving task up to 10" (250mm) in EPS or XPS foam panels. When paired with one of four available battery adapters, the EHK18VROTATE can be powered using Bosch, DeWalt, Makita or Milwaukee batteries. EHKAROTATEKIT is the most complete, fully loaded, deluxe professional kit available and includes: EGUIDE02 Edge Guide EGBADAPT02 Grooving Blade Adapter ESLED02 Professional Sled with 3-piece cutting guide Blade wrench Scraper tool 6" and 8" Straight Blades EFLAT12 12" Flat Blade stock EPG20, EPG27 and EPG34 Pipe Grooving Blades EPLIER Premium Blade Bending Pliers EBLINDHOLE Blind Hole cutting adapter EELECBOX Electrical Box Cutting Adapter Folding wood ruler and marker pen 1 - Charger ECHARGE50 2 - 18v 5.0 Batteries Professional plastic carrying case

description_hint: The TapeTech ETURNTABLE Material Support Turntable is a professional grade accessory for jobsite efficiency.
description_text: The TapeTech ETURNTABLE Material Support Turntable is a professional grade accessory for jobsite efficiency. It quickly attaches to the top rail of scaffolds or swing stages to securely holds foam panels while cutting, grooving or application of material to panels. The robust aluminum turntable is lightweight and rotates to place the foam in the optimal posiiton for the worker. Eliminates the need for workers to work from knees on scaffold or stage or to balance panels on the rail during cutting, grooving or adhesive application. Turntable Width: 12.2” (310mm) Turntable Length: 21.2” (540mm) Maximum Allowable Diameter of Rail: 2.125” (54mm) Minimum Distance Between Rail Centers: 14.2” (360mm) Maximum Distance Between Rail Centers: 23.2” (590mm)

description_hint: The TapeTech EHKEXTEND Hot Knife Extension Pole attaches to TapeTech Hot Knives to quickly add 48" (1200mm) of working length to your hot knife.
description_text: The TapeTech EHKEXTEND Hot Knife Extension Pole attaches to TapeTech Hot Knives to quickly add 48" (1200mm) of working length to your hot knife. Specifically designed to work with TapeTech grooving adapters EGBADAPT01 or EGBADAPT02, the EHKEXTEND allows you to comfortably stand and walk while cutting grooves in EPS or XPS panels stacked on the floor or ground. The EHKEXTEND is constructed of robust aluminum for reliable performance and long life.

description_hint: The TapeTech EBLINDHOLE Blind Hole Cutter is ideal for making custom cuts in EPS or XPS foam when the hole cannot penetrate all the way through the foam.
description_text: The TapeTech EBLINDHOLE Blind Hole Cutter is ideal for making custom cuts in EPS or XPS foam when the hole cannot penetrate all the way through the foam. Perfect for inserting electrical boxes or drain pipes, the Blind Hole Cutter fits all TapeTech professional hot knives.

description_hint: The TapeTech EELECBOX Blind Hole Cutter attaches to all TapeTech Hot Knives and is ideal for cutting blind holes - especially for electrical boxes - in EPS and...
description_text: The TapeTech EELECBOX Blind Hole Cutter attaches to all TapeTech Hot Knives and is ideal for cutting blind holes - especially for electrical boxes - in EPS and XPS foam. EELECBOX cuts a 2.6" (67mm) wide groove or hole with a minimum cutting depth of 1" (25mm) and maximum depth of 2.55" (65mm).

description_hint: TapeTech EGUIDE02 Professional Cutting Guide attaches to TapeTech EHKACROTATE and EHK18VROTATE Hot Knives to assist in calibrated foam cutting.
description_text: TapeTech EGUIDE02 Professional Cutting Guide attaches to TapeTech EHKACROTATE and EHK18VROTATE Hot Knives to assist in calibrated foam cutting. Adjust the T-shaped ruler of the EGUIDE02 Cutting Guide for precise measurements when cutting EPS or XPS foam. Adjust the angle for vertical cutting or 0o to 45o diagonal cutting.

description_hint: Together with available NiChrome groove cutters, the TapeTech EGBADAPT02 Professional Grooving Blade Adapter attaches to TapeTech Model EHKACROTATE and EHK18VRO...
description_text: Together with available NiChrome groove cutters, the TapeTech EGBADAPT02 Professional Grooving Blade Adapter attaches to TapeTech Model EHKACROTATE and EHK18VROTATE Hot Knives to quickly and cleanly cut grooves for pipes, conduits and other objects in EPS or XPS foam. Accepts TapeTech Models EPG20, EPG27, EPG34, all pre-bent grooving blades from TapeTech or site-fabricated, custom bent grooving blades.

description_hint: TheTapeTech ESLED02 Professional Sled is the best hot knife sled in the industry. This premium quality sled measures 8" x 11.75" to provide an extremely stable...
description_text: TheTapeTech ESLED02 Professional Sled is the best hot knife sled in the industry. This premium quality sled measures 8" x 11.75" to provide an extremely stable base and adjusts to cut groove widths between 0.5” – 6.5” (12mm -165mm). The sled features the industry's most innovate cutter block design, with forward facing access for inserting grooving blades quickly and accurately. ESLED02 includes a 3-piece guide rail with a total length of more than 52” (1350mm) for precise grooving across foam panels. The guide rail track can be reversed for right or left sided use. ESLED02 is designed to work with EHKACROTATE and EHK18VROTATE Hot Knives. Includes a retractable tool support stand.

description_hint: TapeTech EGUIDE01 Cutting Guide attaches to TapeTech EHKAC500 and EHKAC-18V Hot Knives to assist in calibrated foam cutting.
description_text: TapeTech EGUIDE01 Cutting Guide attaches to TapeTech EHKAC500 and EHKAC-18V Hot Knives to assist in calibrated foam cutting. Adjust the T-shaped ruler of the EGUIDE01 Cutting Guide for precise measurements when cutting EPS or XPS foam. Adjust the angle for vertical cutting or 0o to 45o diagonal cutting.

description_text: TapeTech PosiFit™ EGB01 grooving blade quickly and cleanly cuts 1" (27mm) grooves for pipes and conduit. Use in conjunction with TapeTech EGBADAPT01 Grooving Blade Adapter.

product_name: EHKAC500KIT TapeTech Air-Cooled Hot Knife KIT-500
description_hint: The TapeTech EHKAC500 is a professional, air-cooled hot knife designed for continuous use to cut EPS and XPS foam panels.
description_text: The TapeTech EHKAC500 is a professional, air-cooled hot knife designed for continuous use to cut EPS and XPS foam panels. The 120V, 190W hot knife achieves temperatures of 932 ° F (500 ° C) within seconds for smooth cuts and increased jobsite productivity. EHKAC500 features electronic circuitboard technology and a spring-loaded safety trigger plus 16-position variable temperature control. EHKAC500KIT is a complete kit that includes the professional, air-cooled hot knife, high quality 8" hot knife blade, Blade Wrench, EGUIDE01 Cutting Guide, ESLED01 Grooving Sled, EFLAT12 12" Flat NiChrome Blade Stock and a Wire Brush all in a robust plastic carry case.

description_hint: TapeTech Ornamental Tools are the ideal instrument to create ornate details in decorative finishes.
description_text: TapeTech Ornamental Tools are the ideal instrument to create ornate details in decorative finishes. The tool is made from high carbon tempered steel for long life. One end of the tool has a trowel shape and the other end features a square, expanding the versatility of shaping and smoothing material, even in the tightest spaces and corners. Decorative work is easy with TapeTech Ornamental Tools. The ergonomic shape fits comfortably in your hand and also provides clearance for your knuckles as you work.

description_text: TapeTech 3/8" Leaf & Square Ornamental Tool VORNLEAF38 The TapeTech 3/8" Leaf & Square Ornamental Tool is the ideal instrument for professionals looking to create ornate and intricate details in decorative finishes. Featuring two versatile ends—a leaf shape on one side and a square on the other—this tool allows for creative shaping and smoothing of materials, even in the tightest spaces and corners. Made from high carbon tempered steel for superior durability, it’s designed to last through daily professional use. Whether working with Venetian plaster or other decorative materials, this tool offers precision, flexibility, and control, making it an essential asset for achieving high-quality finishes. Key Features Dual-Ended Design for Versatility: One end features a leaf shape and the other a square, providing maximum versatility for shaping, smoothing, and adding intricate details to your decorative finishes. High Carbon Tempered Steel Construction: Crafted from high carbon tempered steel, this tool ensures long-lasting durability and resistance to wear, making it ideal for frequent use in demanding environments. Ergonomic Handle for Comfort: The ergonomic shape of the tool provides a comfortable grip, minimizing hand fatigue during extended use. The design also ensures ample knuckle clearance, allowing for easy maneuvering in tight spaces and corners. Precision and Control for Detailed Work: The tool’s design provides a perfect balance of flexibility and control, enabling professionals to achieve flawless results on intricate detail work, whether on walls, ceilings, or more complex surfaces. Durability for Professional Use: Built to withstand the rigors of daily use, this ornamental tool maintains its shape and integrity over time, even when working with thicker materials or applying multiple layers. Usage and Applications The TapeTech 3/8" Leaf & Square Ornamental Tool is designed for professionals who require precision and versatility in their decorative finishing projects. Its dual-ended design, with both a leaf and square shape, allows for intricate detail work and smooth application in tight spaces. The tool’s high carbon steel construction ensures long-lasting durability, while the ergonomic handle offers comfort during extended periods of use. Whether working on Venetian plaster, ornamental designs, or other decorative finishes, this tool consistently delivers professional-grade results. Technical Specifications Material: High Carbon Tempered Steel Dimensions: 215mm x 25mm Dual-Ended: Leaf shape on one end, square shape on the other Handle: Ergonomic design for superior comfort and knuckle clearance Applications: Venetian plaster, decorative finishes, intricate detail work Durability: Built to withstand daily professional use Order yours today and experience the craftsmanship trusted by professionals in the trade.

description_text: TapeTech Premium Finishing Trowels are the highest quality finishing trowels on the market. The 0.65 mm blade thickness makes these finishing trowels the workhorse of your tool kit and the perfect starting point towards the perfect finish of drywall, plaster, EIFS, stucco, epoxy and micro-cements. The triple-hardened European stainless steel blades ensure maximum performance, and the ProSoft handle is slip-resistant and comfortable to reduce user fatigue. TapeTech Premium Finishing Trowels provide the ultimate combination of performance, flexibility and durability, resulting in long life and a perfect finish every time.

description_hint: The TapeTech Premium Finishing Hawk helps with material application in drywall, plaster, EIFS and stucco.
description_text: The TapeTech Premium Finishing Hawk helps with material application in drywall, plaster, EIFS and stucco. Crafted from solid extruded aluminum, the TapeTech Premium Finishing Hawk is robust, durable and resists corrosion. The ergonomic ProSoft handle with extra foam pad helps prevent hand fatigue. And the hollow design of the handle allows you to rest the tool on scaffolding posts. The handle is removable for easy cleaning, transport and storage.

description_hint: The TapeTech 7" Bucket Scoop is perfect to move EIFS, stucco, plaster, mortar and other material from the bucket to your hawk, trowel or mortar board.
description_text: The TapeTech 7" Bucket Scoop is perfect to move EIFS, stucco, plaster, mortar and other material from the bucket to your hawk, trowel or mortar board. Crafted from thick, galvanized steel to prevent bending and buckling that some ordinary scoops experience, our bucket scoop features a hanger strap that extends to the bottom of the scoop for added strength. The wood handle is comfortable for all day use. Diameter: 7" Depth: 3.5"

description_hint: The TapeTech 6.5” Stainless Steel Bucket Scoop is designed to quickly and efficiently remove compound, plaster, EIFS material and stucco from buckets.
description_text: The TapeTech 6.5” Stainless Steel Bucket Scoop is designed to quickly and efficiently remove compound, plaster, EIFS material and stucco from buckets. The curved design fits the wall of the bucket, reducing material waste and making cleaning easier. The stainless steel blade is reinforced with an aluminum backing plate and double-riveted to the handle, ensuring durability and stability. The TapeTech Bucket Scoop is perfect for a variety of applications and materials, including drywall, plaster, EIFS material, stucco, mortar, epoxy, adhesive, thin-set, cement, putty, and more. Features the ergonomic TapeTech ProSoft grip for all-day comfort and reduced fatigue.

description_hint: TapeTech EHKAC-18V is a professional, air-cooled hot knife designed for continuous use anywhere you need to cut or groove EPS or XPS foam panels.
description_text: TapeTech EHKAC-18V is a professional, air-cooled hot knife designed for continuous use anywhere you need to cut or groove EPS or XPS foam panels. Powered by a 18V 2.0 aH battery, the EHKAC-18V air-cooled hot knife achieves operating temperatures of 752 ° F (400 ° C) in seconds. The EHKAC-18V professional kit includes the high performance, cordless air-cooled hot knife, (1) 18V 2.0 aH battery, 21V 2.3 Amp Battery Charger, Blade Wrench, Wire Brush, high quality 4" (100mm) and 6" (150mm) Hot Knife Blades and robust plastic carry case. When paired with one of four available battery adapters, the EHK18VROTATE can be powered using Bosch, DeWalt, Makita or Milwaukee batteries.

description_hint: The TapeTech EHKAC500 is a professional, air-cooled hot knife designed for continuous use to cut EPS and XPS foam panels.
description_text: The TapeTech EHKAC500 is a professional, air-cooled hot knife designed for continuous use to cut EPS and XPS foam panels. The 120V, 190W hot knife achieves temperatures of 932 ° F (500 ° C) within seconds for smooth cuts and increased jobsite productivity. EHKAC500 features electronic circuit board technology and a spring-loaded safety trigger plus 16-position variable temperature control. EHKAC500 includes the professional, air-cooled hot knife, high quality 8" hot knife blade, Blade Wrench and Wire Brush in a robust plastic carry case.

description_text: The TapeTech 18V Cordless Brushless Backpack Vacuum is the perfect complement to the TapeTech EIFSAND120/EIFSAND18V Dual Disc EIFS Hand Sanders. Paired with the cordless EIFSAND18V, the EIFSVAC18V vacuum provides the ultimate mobility on the jobsite and no cords to deal with - perfect for scaffolding! The 3.7 gallon 18V vacuum easily connects to TapeTech EIFS Sanding tools to help reduce foam waste on the job whether you're sanding EPS, XPS, or GPS foam. The 18V Backpack Vacuum plugs easily into the EIFSAND120/EIFSAND18V Dual Disc Sanders. Use a TapeTech battery adapter (sold separately) to quickly and easily use your Bosch, Makita, Milwaukee or DeWalt batteries to keep the vacuum running all day. With a max airflow of 7.4 gallons per second and weighing just 14 pounds, the vacuum is comfortable to wear for all-day use. description_hint: The TapeTech 18V Dual Disc Sander provides the ultimate portability and freedom on the jobsite to quickly sand EPS/XPS panels and many other materials, saving t...
description_text: The TapeTech 18V Dual Disc Sander provides the ultimate portability and freedom on the jobsite to quickly sand EPS/XPS panels and many other materials, saving time and money. The 8" dual disc design features contra-rotation of the discs to provide optimal balance during operation and the independent motor reduces the weight of the tool in the worker's hands. The sander motor hangs from your belt leaving the sander weighing just 5 pounds. The brushless motor includes electronic soft-start and overload protection for dependability and low maintenance. The wide surface area produces a more even surface compared to smaller, standard size hand rasps. Powerful 5.0 Ah batteries sand up to 950 square feet on a single charge. Continuous speed control optimizes performance and maintains speed even under heavy loads. Use a TapeTech battery adapter (sold separately) to quickly and easily use your Bosch, Makita, Milwaukee or DeWalt batteries to keep the sander running all day. The sander features an exhaust outlet that is easily connected to the TapeTech Model EIFSVAC120/EIFSVAC18V Backpack Vacuum, or other vacuums, for increased mobility and a dust free work area. The TapeTech 18V Dual Disc Sander is perfect for working from scaffolding, eliminating cords and increasing mobility. Get the only dustless vacuum drywall hand sander on the market today! The kit includes (2) 5.0 Ah batteries and a 30-minute TapeTech battery quick charger for continuous work. Product Information: Power: 18V RPM: 380 Disc Size: 8" Weight: 6.2lbs Vibration: 1.5m/sec² Noise Level: Lp = 88 dB (A), Lw = 99 dB (A) Protection: Class II

The rounded corner design prevents gouging and the ergonomic handle design allows the worker to use two hands, reducing hand fatigue.

product_name: TapeTech 18" x 4.7" Premium Gold Finishing Trowel
description_hint: TapeTech Premium MIDFLEXX finishing trowels produce a superior finish on drywall, plaster, EIFS, stucco, concrete, epoxy and micro-cement due to the added flexi...
description_text: TapeTech Premium MIDFLEXX finishing trowels produce a superior finish on drywall, plaster, EIFS, stucco, concrete, epoxy and micro-cement due to the added flexibility of the blade compared to standard trowels. Crafted using 0.4 mm European triple-hardened gold stainless steel, these trowels ensure maximum performance and long life. The ProSoft handle is slip-resistant and comfortable to reduce user fatigue. The blades on the TapeTech MIDFLEXX finishing trowels are attached to the handle mount using a special technology that robotically and precisely welds the rivets to the blade surface. These superior quality stainless steel rivets are then pressed into the handle mount, resulting in the strongest trowels available. Other brands use two-sided tape to attach the blade to the mount.

product_name: VCOL240 TapeTech Venetian Trowel for Columns
description_hint: TapeTech Venetian Column Trowel VCOL240 Handcrafted in Italy, the TapeTech column trowel is designed for precisely what the name implies; finishing columns.
description_text: TapeTech Venetian Column Trowel VCOL240 Handcrafted in Italy, the TapeTech column trowel is designed for precisely what the name implies; finishing columns. Regular trowels want to make endless orbits around columns rather than traveling from top to bottom while finishing the circumference. The unique design of the column trowel solves that geometric quandry and encourages the trowel to gradually work its way down the column without leaving marks. The super mirror-polished finish makes application of materials easier and faster. The blades are tempered twice for extra hardness and long life. These blades are highly resistant to scratches for easy clean up. Features: Made in Italy Mirror Polished INOX Stainless Steel Blade Blade Thickness: 0.6mm Size: 9.5" x 4" (240mm x 100mm)

description_hint: TapeTech Taper Rebuild Kit PK-AT02 The TapeTech Taper Rebuild Kit PK-AT02 is designed to ensure the continued optimal performance of TapeTech automatic taping t...
description_text: TapeTech Taper Rebuild Kit PK-AT02 The TapeTech Taper Rebuild Kit PK-AT02 is designed to ensure the continued optimal performance of TapeTech automatic taping tools. This comprehensive kit provides all the necessary components and parts to refurbish and revitalize your taping equipment, helping it operate like new. Inside the PK-AT02 Rebuild Kit, you'll find an assortment of high-quality replacement parts, including precision-engineered gears, bearings, seals, and various other critical components. These components are expertly crafted to meet the exacting standards of TapeTech, a renowned name in the drywall and taping industry. Whether you're a professional drywaller or a dedicated DIY enthusiast, this rebuild kit empowers you to extend the lifespan of your TapeTech automatic taper, ensuring that it continues to deliver smooth and efficient tape application. By replacing worn-out or damaged parts with those included in the PK-AT02 Rebuild Kit, you can maintain consistent, professional-grade results and reduce downtime associated with equipment maintenance.

description_text: TapeTech MudDog™ Premium Taping Banjo The TapeTech Premium MudDog™ Taping Banjo (BAN001-TT) is loaded with features like side straps for left or right handed use, a cutting blade / roller assembly, and a truly ergonomic handle. Perfect for smaller jobs, this banjos functional design beats taping joints by hand. The Mud Dog also holds 33% more compound than traditional banjos, so you get more taping done between fills. description_hint: TapeTech Blue Steel Taping Knife and Pan Kit TapeTech Premium Mud Pans feature stainless steel construction and a contoured bottom to make mixing, cleaning and...
description_text: TapeTech Blue Steel Taping Knife and Pan Kit TapeTech Premium Mud Pans feature stainless steel construction and a contoured bottom to make mixing, cleaning and removal of joint compound easier. The contoured shape is more ergonomic and comfortable to hold. The continuous heli-arc weld provides maximum durability and value. TapeTech Premium Taping and Jointing Knives feature the optimal combination of design, materials experience and testing to produce knives with the best balance, flex, comfort, and control so you achieve premium results when applying and smoothing joint compound. The handle’s over-sized, tapered shape provides the most ergonomic, slip-resistant grip. The enlarged, alloy hammer end allows it to be used to set protruding fasteners, adjust installation flaws, and protect against damage if the knife is dropped. TapeTech Premium Taping and Joint Knife blades are precision ground and polished to provide the perfect amount of flex and finish. The Carbon Steel and Blue Steel blades provide ultimate feel. TapeTech Premium Taping Knives feature the strongest backing plate in the industry, preventing unwanted blade deflection while providing smooth, consistent control and finish. Kit Includes: 1 - TapeTech 6" Carbon Steel Joint Knife 1 - TapeTech 8" Blue Steel Joint Knife 1 - TapeTech 10" Blue Steel Joint Knife 1 - TapeTech 12" Blue Steel Joint Knife 1 - TapeTech 12" Stainless Steel Mud Pan
features: 1 - TapeTech 6" Carbon Steel Joint Knife | 1 - TapeTech 8" Blue Steel Joint Knife | 1 - TapeTech 10" Blue Steel Joint Knife | 1 - TapeTech 12" Blue Steel Joint Knife | 1 - TapeTech 12" Stainless Steel Mud Pan

description_hint: TapeTech 8" and 10" Blue Steel Knife Kit TapeTech Premium Taping and Jointing Knives feature the optimal combination of design, materials experience and testing...
description_text: TapeTech 8" and 10" Blue Steel Knife Kit TapeTech Premium Taping and Jointing Knives feature the optimal combination of design, materials experience and testing to produce knives with the best balance, flex, comfort, and control so you achieve premium results when applying and smoothing joint compound. The handle’s over-sized, tapered shape provides the most ergonomic, slip-resistant grip. The enlarged, alloy hammer end allows it to be used to set protruding fasteners, adjust installation flaws, and protect against damage if the knife is dropped. TapeTech Premium Taping and Joint Knife blades are precision ground and polished to provide the perfect amount of flex and finish. The Carbon Steel and Blue Steel blades provide ultimate feel. TapeTech Premium Taping Knives feature the strongest backing plate in the industry, preventing unwanted blade deflection while providing smooth, consistent control and finish. description_text: TapeTech Premium Finishing Knife Extendable Handle (XHTT) + Premium Finishing Knife Adapter (PFKHATT) An interchangeable, extendable handle system that allows one support handle to be used with Corner Rollers, Angle Boxes, Angle Heads, Nail Spotters, and Skimming Blades/Finishing Knives! The base handle XHTT fits the corner roller without adapters, as well as the new design corner applicator and nail spotter without adapters. The new, optimal 1.25" diameter makes TapeTech XHTT handles the most ergonomic in the industry. The Premium Finishing Knife Handle adapter PFKHATT is more robust, provides quick angle adjustment and improved durability. The Handle Adapter quickly and securely attaches to the TapeTech FHTT or XHTT Support handles. The D-Shape fitting prevents twisting. This handle adapter also features a robust wing nut and quick-release cam locks, for easy removal. XHTT Handle Features: Single Handle With Attachments For A Variety Of Tools D-Shaped Fitting Eliminates Corner Box Movement Comfortable and Ergonomic Extendable from 43"-77" Lightweight Only 2.15lbs 1.25" Diameter XHTT Handle Fitments and Adapters: The Corner Applicator Adapter (CAA-TT) The Nail Spotter Adapter (NSA-TT) Corner Finisher/ Angle Head Adapter (CFA-TT) Corner Applicator/ Angle Box Handle Adapter (CAA-TT) PFKHATT Adapter Features: Specially Designed For Use With TapeTech Smoothing Blades D-Shape Prevents Twisting Quick-Release Cam Locks Attaches To FHTT Or XHTT Handles Extendable Support Handle XHTT

description_text: TapeTech 6" Carbon Steel Clipped Joint Knife TapeTech Premium Taping and Jointing Knives feature the optimal combination of design, materials experience and testing to produce knives with the best balance, flex, comfort, and control so you achieve premium results when applying and smoothing joint compound. TapeTech Premium Taping Knives feature the strongest backing plate in the industry, preventing unwanted blade deflection while providing smooth, consistent control and finish. This kit comes with four sturdy caster wheels, two of which have locking mechanisms to keep your wash station steady while in use, making it ideal for commercial or portable cleaning setups. Features: Smooth Maneuverability: Swivel casters make it simple to move on a variety of surfaces, such as asphalt, tile, and concrete. Dependable Braking System: The station is securely held in place by two wheels that are fitted with easy-use locks. Sturdy Construction: Made from industrial-grade steel and rubber for long-lasting performance under heavy loads and damp conditions.

description_hint: TapeTech Mobile Wash Station MWS01-TT The TapeTech MWS01-TT Mobile Wash Station is the lightest and most portable wash station available.
description_text: TapeTech Mobile Wash Station MWS01-TT The TapeTech MWS01-TT Mobile Wash Station is the lightest and most portable wash station available. It is the perfect solution for cleaning tools and equipment on the jobsite, especially when water supplies are limited. Working from just a 5-gallon bucket of water, the MWS01-TT generates the ideal water pressure to effectively clean drywall finishing tools, paint brushes, rollers, pans and more! The MWS01-TT also helps finishers and painters comply with environmental laws by providing a convenient, professional wash station that does not wash the joint compound or paint into the soil. The legs of the MWS01-TT open and close effortlessly for quick set up, break down and transport. The MWS01-TT weighs just 34 pounds. Features: Improved pump that only circulates while the trigger is being operated, extending the life of the pump and providing twice the cleaning power of the original pump Improved spray hose & nozzle with more control over pressure and directional spray Now includes Accessory Kit (MWS-ACC) with basket, drain riser, and nozzle brush to dry your tools, keep compound out of your water bucket, and remove stubborn compound Locking Wheel Kit – MWS01-LW also included lets you easily move your Mobile Wash Station around and lock when needed

description_text: TapeTech Tool Caddy TC01TT The TapeTech Tool Caddy make filling finishing boxes with a compound tube even easier. It conveniently holds any length compound tube and filler adapter, preventing the need to place the tool on the floor or in the bucket of joint compound between fills. The Tool Caddy is light weight, durable, and securely holds any size finishing box in the perfect filling position. The Tool Caddy prevents joint compound from leaking and can be adjusted to fit almost any bucket height. The Caddy also provides a safe place to rest finishing boxes when not in use. A perfect accessory for any finisher. product_name: TT07-C TapeTech Carbon Fiber Automatic Taper
description_hint: TapeTech Carbon Fiber EasyClean® Automatic Taper The Lightest TapeTech Taper Ever!
description_text: TapeTech Carbon Fiber EasyClean® Automatic Taper The Lightest TapeTech Taper Ever! TapeTech is excited to introduce the new 07TT-C Carbon Fiber Automatic Taper. At just 5.65 pounds, the 07TT-C is up to 20% lighter than standard tapers, which helps in reducing worker fatigue. The main tube and the control tube are carbon fiber, a material that will not dent and is temperature-neutral. No more cold tubes in the winter or hot tubes in the summer! Features Include: Easy Grip Control Tube. The control tube has been lengthened 2.5" and glide wheels added to make tape cuts easier and more comfortable. The glide wheels are recessed into flanges at each end of the control tube, and act as stops for your hands - requiring much less grip-force to operate the cutter. Quick-Change Tape Bail Locks into place, making it easy to change tape rolls without having to put the taper down. Best of all, there are no loose parts to misplace or re-install. To change tape rolls, grasp the tape retainer wire near the end of the spool post and depress it down and out through the retainer slot. Swing the retainer wire up and out of the way, change tape rolls, sliding the new roll fully onto the spool post. Swing the retainer wire back down, and guide it into the retainer slot. It’s that simple! No Hassle Cable Changes. The plunger stop has been improved to simplify cable changes. The metal and exposed screw heads have been replaced with a smooth, rounded, plastic plunger stop that is easy to remove and re-install. To remove the plunger stop, lift the locking tab and twist the stop ¼ turn counterclockwise. After twisting, pull the stop off the taper and complete the cable change following the normal procedure (see Cable Replacement). To re-install, align the guide tabs to the slots and slide the stop into the taper end, twisting ¼ turn clockwise. Continue twisting until the tab snaps into place, locking the assembly together. If oriented correctly, very little force should be required to install the stop. Changing a cable has never been easier! Adjustable Braking System. This feature allows you to adjust the braking system for your personal preference. Now you have the control over the brake. It also can be adjusted tighter or looser to account for wear on your taper.

description_hint: TapeTech Premium Work Pants TapeTech offers the most durable, functional, and comfortable workwear you will ever own.
description_text: TapeTech Premium Work Pants TapeTech offers the most durable, functional, and comfortable workwear you will ever own. This workwear is specifically designed to withstand the wear and tear on any jobsite and provides the storage you need for tools, keys, cell phone - (anything you need to be successful). Every purchase you make should be an investment in your success and profitability. Based on a national survey, the average professional drywall finisher buys 10 pairs of denim jeans or painter's pants every year. That's an expense of $200-400 every year. TapeTech Premium Workwear lasts for years, even under extreme jobsite conditions, making it a smart investment. Lifetime Warranty: TapeTech Workwear carries a Lifetime Warranty on the seams and workmanship. If a seam splits or fails, as long as it has not been cut or torn by tools or other sharp edges, TapeTech will replace the article. The "lifetime" of TapeTech Workwear is considered to be until the garment has holes worn through, frayed edges, or is otherwise no longer useful. Features: 13 pockets 7 extra wide double belt loops Triple stitching for maximum durability Reflective striping and piping Reinforced knees and cuffs Elastic waist for adjustment between sizes Pockets for kneepads 44" - Inseam Sizes Run Big

description_hint: TapeTech 3.5" EasyRoll® Angle Head Reduces drag with easy rolling rubber-tired wheels.
description_text: TapeTech 3.5" EasyRoll® Angle Head Reduces drag with easy rolling rubber-tired wheels. Used to perfectly feather both sides of internal drywall tape corners in one pass. Integrated spring adjusters allow quick change of spring tension to suit any drywall finishing job. 3.5" EasyRoll angle head can also be attached to angle box, corner box or Mudrunner to apply final smooth feathered finish to inside drywall corner angles. Tape Tech Easy Roll 3.5" corner finishing tool glides smoothly in drywall corners due to reduced friction. Use angle head to feather inside 90 degree tape corners after applying with banjo, compound applicator or automatic taper. EasyRoll angle corner finisher can also be used to apply final smooth feathered finish coat of compound, by simply attaching to an angle box (also known as flusher box, hockey box or corner applicator). Convenient spring adjustment levers quickly allow change of tension preference. Firm spring adjustment is often used when final finishing inside drywall angles, and softer setting is popular when applying tape coat. The 3.5" EasyRoll corner finisher can be used both for applying tape as well as smooth skimming finish compound to inside 90 degree drywall angle corners. Convenient Spring Tension Levers Locking Clip Retainer Eliminates Damaging Disconnects EasyRoll Wheels With Rubber Tires Reduce Friction Evenly finishes Both Sides Of Inside 90 degree angles 5-Year Manufacturer's Warranty

description_text: TapeTech 12" MaxxBox™ Flat Box EHC12 MaxxBox design holds up to 68% more mud than other high capacity flat boxes. MaxxBox offers increased efficiency and production speed, allowing you to finish more between fill ups without tiring you out. Pressure plate is connected to solid hinge for wider opening and easier cleaning. Tape Tech 12" High Capacity Maxxbox is excellent choice for base coating drywall flat seams, butt joints and corner bead. The adjustable mud outlet dial, allows the MaxxBox to provide high compound capacity while maintaining a precision metered finish. description_hint: TapeTech 2" Angle Head Used to perfectly feather both sides of internal drywall tape corners in one pass.
description_text: TapeTech 2" Angle Head Used to perfectly feather both sides of internal drywall tape corners in one pass. The corner finisher, also known as corner finisher, angle finisher, or glazer, is attached to a corner applicator, angle box, MudRunner® or angle head handle to quickly and professionally finish internal drywall corners. An angle head can be used for any 90º inside drywall corner, at either wall or ceiling junctions, and embeds inside angle tape on walls and ceilings by smoothly feathering excess mud in internal corners. TapeTech Corner Finishers are spring loaded to help compensate for slight corner imperfections. The TapeTech 2" corner finisher angle head is ideal for tape coats and for finishing drywall projects with narrow door legs or window trim areas. Stainless steel frames provide many years of reliable service and positive ball retainer keeps angle head securely attached to angle box, Mudrunner or angle head handle, eliminating surprise disconnects or tool damage. Locking Clip Retainer Eliminates Damaging Disconnects. Perfect For Glazing Tape Coat Narrow Side Legs Welded Steel Frames Durable Nickel-Plating Die-cast aluminum body resists corrosion
