product_name: QB08-QSX TapeTech QuickBox QSX 8 in Finishing Box
description_hint: TapeTech QuickBox QSX 8" Finishing Box The first finishing box specifically designed to be used with fast-setting joint compounds (hot mud).
description_text: TapeTech QuickBox QSX 8" Finishing Box The first finishing box specifically designed to be used with fast-setting joint compounds (hot mud). Combine the speed of same day multi-coat hot mud with ATF flat box consistent finish! The 8” QuickBox™ QSX is the perfect tool for drywallers who prefer to use fast-setting joint compound when embedding the joint tape. The QuickBox™ QSX works with paper tape, fiberglass tape or the new fiber joint tapes. The QuickBox™ QSX can be used for a wide variety of applications - Tape Embed, Nail Spot, Flex Trim Coating, Tight Area, Short Runs, and more. Constructed from advanced space age materials, fast-setting joint compound is easily removed from the finishing box, even hours or days later. The compound literally falls out of the QuickBox™ QSX with a few light taps. QuickBox™ QSX features: A glass-filled polypropylene shell that provides a slick surface with maximum strength and durability. Large wheels to roll easily over any type of gypsum panels Pressure plate that opens completely for easy filling and cleaning. The box can be filled easily with the pump, the compound tube or by hand An optimized blade design that matches the blade with the application, eliminating the need to make adjustments or change crown settings. Tool-free design for ultra-fast blade changes. Works with all TapeTech and major brand finishing box handles, including the Wizard®. Includes two blades

description_text: TapeTech ATF Tool Maintenance Kit Introducing a Tool Maintenance Kit, specifically designed by TapeTech, for Automatic Taping and Finishing Tools. "The right tools for the job." Included in this kit are 4 Nut Drivers, 4 T-Handle Allen Keys, 1 Standard Hex Key, and 2 Custom Feeler Gauges (for calibrating the blades on finishing boxes and corner finishers). The foam-lined case keeps all your tools in one place, organized and protected, for storage or transport. The TapeTech ATF Tool Maintenance Kit is a must-have for all professional drywall finishers. description_hint: TapeTech 15" EasyClean™ Flat Box EZ15TT The largest Flat Box on the market! The 15" rigid design easily applies the right amount of drywall joint compound while...
description_text: TapeTech 15" EasyClean™ Flat Box EZ15TT The largest Flat Box on the market! The 15" rigid design easily applies the right amount of drywall joint compound while feathering both edges at the same time. The main extrusion strongly supports side plates for greater strength. Perfect for applying a wide finish coat to drywall flat seams or butt joints, these boxes will also fit all major brands of flat box handles. The EasyRoll™ wheel system allows you to expertly finish all types of outside corner bead up to two times faster than finishing by hand. EasyRoll™ wheels work with all types of outside corner bead including metal, paper-faced, vinyl and bullnose. These wheels provide a shoulder to guide the finishing box along the corner bead without after-market attachments or damage to the axle. The shoulder of the EasyRoll™ wheels are more than three times wider than after-market products, making it easier to place, and keep the finishing box on the corner bead. EasyRoll™ wheels are engineered and designed to be perfectly aligned with the finishing blade, eliminating the need to tilt the finishing box like you must with common after-market wheel systems. A Wider Base For Better Results Perfect For Wide Finish Coats On Flat Seams and Butt Joints. Coat Corner Bead With EZ Roll Wheels Quick Release Thumb Latches For Easy Cleanup Rigid Shell Design Easy Blade Carrier Dial Adjustment For Precision Fits All Major Brand Drywall Flat Box Handles 5-Year Manufacturer's Warranty.

description_text: TapeTech Automatic Taper Extension for 07TT Taper The TapeTech Automatic Taper Extension adds an extra 30" or (76cm) to the TapeTech 07TT EasyClean® Automatic Taper. This Automatic Taper Extension quickly converts your standard TapeTech taper, without the use of additional tools or equipment, allowing you to reach higher joints. This extension provides its own control tube for advancing and cutting as well as an independent creaser wheel control lever. Reach higher with the TapeTech Automatic Taper Extension for the 07TT taper. *Note – This product is NOT compatible with the 07TT-C EasyClean® Carbon Fiber Automatic Taper.

description_hint: TapeTech 4" Combo Flusher CF40COMBO Can be used as either a direct or indirect flusher.
description_text: TapeTech 4" Combo Flusher CF40COMBO Can be used as either a direct or indirect flusher. Indirect flushers are used to smooth compound that has been applied by another tool. Direct flushers can be used to apply joint compound to internal corners. You can simply choose the size flusher to suit your needs without worrying which style to order. The Corner Flushers fit all standard angle boxes, corner boxes, angle head handles or Mudrunner. This TapeTech 4" Combo Flusher includes the TapeTech Creaser Wheel Kit that can be used to simultaneously bed and glaze tape into inside drywall angles. Kit includes: Stainless Steel Body Optional Roller Wheels Available Ultra Light, Durable Skids Can Be Used as Either Indirect or Direct Flusher Mounting Bracket Corner Wheel Corner Wheel Bushing Fasteners

product_name: TapeTech Extendable Angle Box Handle XHTT/CAA
description_hint: TapeTech XHTT/CAA is an all-new aluminum extendable angle box handle that is part of an interchangeable handle system.
description_text: TapeTech XHTT/CAA is an all-new aluminum extendable angle box handle that is part of an interchangeable handle system. One support handle can be used with Corner Rollers, Angle Boxes, Angle Heads, and Nail Spotters! The base handle XHTT fits the corner roller without adapters, as well as the new design corner applicator and nail spotter without adapters. The new, optimal 1.25" diameter makes TapeTech XHTT handles the most ergonomic in the industry. The XHTT features a D-shaped fitting that securely positions the handle in the Corner Applicator and positively prevents the tool from rotating during use. TapeTech XHTT/CAA Interchangeable Handle Kit Features: Includes the CAA adapter for older style corner finisher boxes or angle boxes Extendable from 43"-77" Lightweight and maneuverable at only 2.15 lbs Use a single handle with attachments for a variety of tools. 1.25" Diameter is comfortable and ergonomic D-Shaped fitting end that eliminates corner box movement Handle Fitments and Adapters: The Corner Applicator adapter (CAA-TT) is included with the new Corner Applicators (CA07TT and CA08TT). Or you can purchase it separately to use the new handle system with your existing Corner Applicators. The Nail Spotter adapter (NSA-TT) is included with the new Nail Spotters (Models NS02TT and NS03TT). Or you can purchase it separately to use the new handle system with your existing Nail Spotters. If you have the current 35TT or 50TT Corner Applicators, you need the FHTT or the XHTT plus the CAA-TT adapter. If you have the current 63TT or 68TT Nail Spotters, you need the FHTT or the XHTT plus the NSA-TT adapter.

product_name: NS03TT TapeTech 3" EasyClean® Nail Spotter Head
description_hint: TapeTech 3" EasyClean® Nail Spotter NS02TT Allows you to spot ceilings without the use of stilts faster and more efficient than spotting nails by hand.
description_text: TapeTech 3" EasyClean® Nail Spotter NS02TT Allows you to spot ceilings without the use of stilts faster and more efficient than spotting nails by hand. Featuring the EasyClean® Lid, quick release latch, and gasket system (similar to a flat box). This allows easy access and hassle-free clean up. This Nail Spotter gives you the flexibility for any size job, and is an ideal single spotter system. The traditional style skid plate is both a pivot point and a screw detector, which helps prevent blade damage. The spotter body is made of high quality stainless steel that will not rust or deteriorate. Each TapeTech Nail Spotter includes a Nail Spotter Adapter NSA-TT which attaches to both Interchangeable Fiberglass Handle FHTT (not included) and Interchangeable Extendable Handle XHTT (not included). description_text: TapeTech Interchangeable Extendable Support Handle XHTT An interchangeable, extendable handle system that allows one support handle to be used with Corner Rollers, Angle Boxes, Angle Heads, and Nail Spotters! The base handle XHTT fits the corner roller without adapters, as well as the new design corner applicator and nail spotter without adapters. The new, optimal 1.25" diameter makes TapeTech XHTT handles the most ergonomic in the industry. The XHTT features a D-shaped fitting that securely positions the handle in the Corner Applicator and positively prevents the tool from rotating during use. Features: Single Handle With Attachments For A Variety Of Tools D-Shaped Fitting Eliminates Corner Box Movement Comfortable and Ergonomic Extendable from 43"-77" Lightweight Only 2.15lbs 1.25" Diameter Handle Fitments and Adapters: The Corner Applicator Adapter (CAA-TT) The Nail Spotter Adapter (NSA-TT) Corner Finisher/ Angle Head Adapter (CFA-TT) Corner Applicator/ Angle Box Handle Adapter (CAA-TT) Note: If you use your current Nail Spotters with the new handle system you will need to mount the handle in the back holes of the tabs on the Nail Spotter. If you have the current 63TT or 68TT Nail Spotters, you need the FHTT or the XHTT plus the NSA-TT adapter. If you have the current 35TT or 50TT Corner Applicators, you need the FHTT or the XHTT plus the CAA-TT adapter.

description_hint: TapeTech 12" EasyClean™ Flat Box EZ12TT The rigid design allows the flat box to apply just the right amount of drywall joint compound, feathering both edges at...
description_text: TapeTech 12" EasyClean™ Flat Box EZ12TT The rigid design allows the flat box to apply just the right amount of drywall joint compound, feathering both edges at the same time. The main extrusion strongly supports side plates for greater strength. Ideal for applying for applying finish coat to drywall flat seams or butt joints, These boxes will also fit all major brands of flat box handles. The EasyRoll™ wheel system allows you to expertly finish all types of outside corner bead up to two times faster than finishing by hand. EasyRoll™ wheels work with all types of outside corner bead including metal, paper-faced, vinyl and bullnose. These wheels provide a shoulder to guide the finishing box along the corner bead without after-market attachments or damage to the axle. The shoulder of the EasyRoll™ wheels are more than three times wider than after-market products, making it easier to place, and keep the finishing box on the corner bead. EasyRoll™ wheels are engineered and designed to be perfectly aligned with the finishing blade, eliminating the need to tilt the finishing box like you must with common after-market wheel systems. Perfect For Finish Coats On Flat Seams and Butt Joints. Coat Corner Bead With EZ Roll Wheels Quick Release Thumb Latches For Easy Cleanup Rigid Shell Design Easy Blade Carrier Dial Adjustment For Precision Fits All Major Brand Drywall Flat Box Handles 5-Year Manufacturer's Warranty.

product_name: QB06-QSX TapeTech QuickBox QSX 6.5 in Finishing Box
description_hint: TapeTech QuickBox QSX 6.5" Finishing Box QuickBox™ QSX - is the first finishing box specifically designed to be used with fast-setting joint compounds (hot mud)...
description_text: TapeTech QuickBox QSX 6.5" Finishing Box QuickBox™ QSX - is the first finishing box specifically designed to be used with fast-setting joint compounds (hot mud). Combine the speed of same day multi-coat hot mud with ATF flat box consistent finish! The 6 ½” QuickBox™ QSX is the perfect tool for drywallers who prefer to use fast-setting joint compound when embedding the joint tape. The QuickBox™ QSX works with paper tape, fiberglass tape or the new fiber joint tapes. The QuickBox™ QSX can be used for a wide variety of applications - Tape Embed, Nail Spot, Flex Trim Coating, Tight Area, Short Runs, and more. Constructed from advanced space age materials, fast-setting joint compound is easily removed from the finishing box, even hours or days later. The compound literally falls out of the QuickBox™ QSX with a few light taps. QuickBox™ QSX features: A glass-filled polypropylene shell that provides a slick surface with maximum strength and durability. Large wheels to roll easily over any type of gypsum panels Pressure plate that opens completely for easy filling and cleaning. The box can be filled easily with the pump, the compound tube or by hand An optimized blade design that matches the blade with the application, eliminating the need to make adjustments or change crown settings. Tool-free design for ultra-fast blade changes. Works with all TapeTech and major brand finishing box handles, including the Wizard®. Includes two blades (QB6003 standard and QB6023 crown)

description_text: TapeTech 12" POWER ASSIST® MAXXBOX® PAHC12 Gives you the extra capacity you want in a high capacity Flat Box, with half the effort. Save time and reduce fatigue by letting the tool do more of the work. Featuring a smart design that matches the usable capacity to the application. The TapeTech Power Assist® finishing box holds just the right amount of joint compound to keep you finishing longer without wearing you out. The POWER ASSIST® MAXXBOX® is sure to become the industry standard for finishing! Adjustable dial crown setting allows the user to easily apply just the right amount of compound over flat seams and butt joints on walls and ceilings. These boxes work with all major brand flat box handles, including the Wizard™ handle for Power Assist® boxes 8000TT-PA (not included). Flat box brake handle controls position of MAXXBOX® to activate the POWER ASSIST® mechanism. Pressure plate reverse spring setup then helps apply the joint compound. MAXXBOX® high capacity holds more mud compound, saving you trips back and forth to the the pump for refills, increasing your production ability. Perfect For Finish Coats on Flat Seams, and Butt Joints Pivoting Axle Adjusts To Any Drywall Surface Adjustable Crown Control For Correct Compound Output Designed To Improve Speed and Efficiency Reverse Springs For Power Assisted Finishing EasyClean Pressure Plate For Fast Cleanup High Mud Compound Capacity

description_hint: TapeTech 2.5" Angle Head Used to perfectly feather both sides of internal drywall tape corners in one pass.
description_text: TapeTech 2.5" Angle Head Used to perfectly feather both sides of internal drywall tape corners in one pass. The corner finisher, also known as corner finisher, angle finisher, or glazer, is attached to a corner applicator, angle box, MudRunner® or angle head handle to quickly and professionally finish internal drywall corners. An angle head can be used for any 90º inside drywall corner, at either wall or ceiling junctions, and embeds inside angle tape on walls and ceilings by smoothly feathering excess mud in internal corners. TapeTech Corner Finishers are spring loaded to help compensate for slight corner imperfections. The TapeTech 2.5" corner finisher angle head is ideal for tape coats and for finishing drywall projects with narrow door legs or window trim areas. Stainless steel frames provide many years of reliable service and positive ball retainer keeps angle head securely attached to angle box, Mudrunner or angle head handle, eliminating surprise disconnects or tool damage. Locking Clip Retainer Eliminates Damaging Disconnects. Perfect For Glazing Tape Coat Narrow Side Legs Welded Steel Frames Durable Nickel-Plating Die-cast aluminum body resists corrosion

description_text: TapeTech 4" Corner Flusher can quickly glaze or finish inside corners. Direct flushers can be used to apply joint compound to internal corners. Indirect flushers are used to smooth compound that has been applied by another tool. TapeTech CF40TT flusher can be used as either a direct or indirect flusher. You can simply choose the size flusher to suit your needs without worrying which style to order. The Corner Flusher fist all standard corner boxes, angle boxes, angle head handles or Mudrunner. TapeTech corner flusher can be used to apply final finish coat over inside drywall corner angles by attaching to angle box, corner box or Mudrunner or as an indirect flusher for skimming over compound applied with applicator. Durable ultra-light weight skids offer long, reliable service. Optional wheels can be mounted for super smooth finishing. product_name: TapeTech Wizard Compact Flat Box Handle 8000TT-PA
description_hint: TapeTech Wizard Compact Flat Box Handle 8000TT-PA for Power Assist Boxes BIGGER ISN'T ALWAYS BETTER! !
description_text: TapeTech Wizard Compact Flat Box Handle 8000TT-PA for Power Assist Boxes BIGGER ISN'T ALWAYS BETTER! ! The New Wizard™ Compact Flat Box Handle lets you take your flat box places it has never been. This model is specially designed for use with TapeTech Power Assist flat boxes. The compact size of the Wizard™ allows you to use your box in tight spaces like closets or under stairs. The Wizard™ gives you unmatched control by placing your hand directly over the pressure plate. The extra leverage gives you more power with less force and is much safer when working on scaffolding. This handle is angled to give you the extra clearance needed on the power assist boxes. This revolutionary design has the ability to reverse the front handle, allowing for multiple hand positions, which reduces worker fatigue. The lack of a brake handle on the Wizard™ means even an unexperienced finisher can learn quickly. Features: Compact size (10.5") fits where other handles can't, making closets and tight spots no problem. Specially angled to fit on TapeTech Power Assist Flat Boxes Unmatched control and leverage, achieved by placing your hand directly over the pressure plate. Improved ergonomics, including the reversible handle to reduce fatigue.

description_text: The CA07TT 7" TapeTech Corner Applicator with XHTT Interchangeable Extension Handle incorporates the new XHT/FHTT handle connection with non-slip D shaped input and extendable convenience. The CA07TT Angle Box is used in conjunction with Angle Heads/Corner Finishers, Mud Applicator Heads, and Corner Bead Mud Heads to apply drywall compound to internal and external corners. TapeTech XHTT is an interchangeable extendable handle system that allows one support handle to be used with Corner Rollers, Angle Boxes, Angle Heads, and Nail Spotters! The base handle XHTT fits the CA07TT corner box and corner roller without adapters. The new, optimal 1.25" diameter makes TapeTech XHTT handles the most ergonomic in the industry. The XHTT features a D-shaped fitting that securely positions the handle in the Corner Applicator and positively prevents the tool from rotating during use. TapeTech Angle Boxes feature a lightweight aluminum body with durable stainless steel nose cone. The 7" model is slightly more compact than the 8" model, and easier to use in tight areas. The 7" is lighter than its 8" counterpart, but has a downside of less mud capacity. TapeTech CA07TT Angle Box with XHTT Extendable Handle: Includes New XHTT D Handle Connector Extension Handle 43"-77" Use a single handle with attachments for a variety of tools. product_name: TT15EXT TapeTech Corner Roller w/ Extendable Handle
description_hint: TapeTech 15TTE Corner Roller with XHTT Interchangeable Aluminum Extender Handle is the newest version standard angle roller.
description_text: TapeTech 15TTE Corner Roller with XHTT Interchangeable Aluminum Extender Handle is the newest version standard angle roller. The 15TTE Corner Roller head incorporates several new design elements that make it easier to clean and operate. The wheels are a departure from the old reversible steel wheels - Replaced with stainless steel roller wheels filled with plastic. The new design washes easier, keeps mud from caking up the wheels, and eliminates stuck wheels. The wheels are attached with a stud design that inhibits wear, and eases friction. Combine the Roller with TapeTech's new XHTT D-Shaped Interchangeable 43"-77" Extendable Aluminum Handle, and you're covered from floor to ceiling. The corner roller drywall tool is used to embed drywall paper tape firmly into the corner in preparation for use with a corner finisher angle head. All TapeTech tools come with an industry-best 5-year limited warranty. Additionally, the tools can be serviced through All-Wall with 2 authorized warranty and repair locations. For over 25 years, TapeTech has served the needs of the drywall industry, producing tools of uncompromising quality, durability and performance. TapeTech’s engineers are continuously designing new tools and improving existing tools to make the job of the finishing professional easier. TapeTech Corner Roller with XHTT Handle Features: Steel Rollers with Plastic Interior provides smooth operation, and are easy to clean Lightweight and fast tool to bed the tape into inside corners forming a sharp corner at the same time. Can embed tape in 12-foot high corners while standing on the floor. Includes TapeTech XHTT Interchangeable 43"-77" Aluminum Extendable Handle Handle diameter of 1.25" is larger and more comfortable than previous versions D-Shaped XHTT handle fits the TapeTech Angle Boxes, Nail Spotters and Corner Finishers with available adapters

description_hint: The TapeTech Mini Taper has the quality and features you expect from TapeTech but now in a Limited Edition Mini size.
description_text: The TapeTech Mini Taper has the quality and features you expect from TapeTech but now in a Limited Edition Mini size. You can expect great things to come in small packages with the the latest from TapeTech! Perfect for working in tight spaces where you can't fit a standard size taper! Mini Taper Length: 41 inches (104 cm) vs. Standard Taper length of 53 inches (134 cm). QUICK-CHANGE TAPE BAIL locks into place, making it easy to change tape rolls without having to put the taper down. Best of all, there are no loose parts to misplace or re-install. To change tape rolls, grasp the tape retainer wire near the end of the spool post and depress it down and out through the retainer slot. Swing the retainer wire up and out of the way, change tape rolls, sliding the new roll fully onto the spool post. Swing the retainer wire back down, and guide it into the retainer slot. It’s that simple! NO HASSLE CABLE CHANGES. The plunger stop has been improved to simplify cable changes. The metal and exposed screw heads have been replaced with a smooth, rounded, plastic plunger stop that is easy to remove and re-install. To remove the plunger stop, lift the locking tab and twist the stop ¼ turn counterclockwise. After twisting, pull the stop off the taper and complete the cable change following the normal procedure (see Cable Replacement). To re-install, align the guide tabs to the slots and slide the stop into the taper end, twisting ¼ turn clockwise. Continue twisting until the tab snaps into place, locking the assembly together. If oriented correctly, very little force should be required to install the stop. Changing a cable has never been easier! All TapeTech tools come with an industry-best 5-year limited warranty. Additionally, the tools can be serviced through All-Wall with 2 authorized warranty and repair locations.
features: Mini Taper Length: 41 inches (104 cm)vs.Standard Taper length of 53 inches (134 cm).

product_name: TapeTech Continuous Flow Taping Bundle CTPMP/T05CF
description_hint: TapeTech Continuous Flow Taping Bundle are the most productive taping tools available.
description_text: TapeTech Continuous Flow Taping Bundle are the most productive taping tools available. Developed with a cooperation between industry giants - TapeTech and Graco, the Continuous Flow System is revolutionizing drywall finishing today. The BAZOOKA™ CFS pump supplies a continuous flow of joint compound to the automatic taper (Bazooka), as well as optional flat boxes, and corner finishing tools. Increase speed, productivity, work safety, and ergonomics by Never Filling Up Again! Achieve maximum time on the wall with the BAZOOKA™ Continuous Flow System. No more repetitive trips to the pump required to fill tools, and no more difficulties moving compound buckets around the jobsite for finishers. Connect your tools and workers to the BAZOOKA™ Continuous Flow System, and eliminate wasted time - Increase your profits on every job! How It Works The Bazooka CFS is powered by a Graco Endurance™ Pump that delivers 1.5 GPM and features the Advantage Drive™ System with long lasting hardened steel gears. The onboard 25 gallon hopper includes an air tight lid that preserves compound overnight, and also acts as a portable wash station. The really cool feature of the BAZOOKA™ Continuous Flow System - Is the FLOW! The Flow Control is based on radio frequency (RF) technology, and controls the Graco pump from the tool handle - Without Wires! The (RF) eliminates the burping and pressure builds that plague competitive units, and have the added bonus of being speed controlled inline, instead of exclusively at the pump. The Tools TapeTech BAZOOKA™ CFS drywall tools are designed to be the lightest and most ergonomic tools available. The weight of the BAZOOKA™ Taper is reduced to only 7lbs during use, and its ultra-slim design drastically reduces worker fatigue. BAZOOKA™ Continuous Flow Taper Bundle Includes: Graco Continuous Flow Pump 50' Material Hose Set Continuous Flow BAZOOKA™ Taper Continuous Flow Taper & Corner Finisher Flow Controller
features: Graco Continuous Flow Pump | 50' Material Hose Set | Continuous Flow BAZOOKA™ Taper | Continuous Flow Taper & Corner Finisher Flow Controller

description_text: TapeTech Continuous Flow Tool Fill Kit CTFIL is part of the Continuous Flow Drywall Finishing System. It attaches to the Continuous Flow pump (CTPMP) to allow goosenecks and filler adapters to be used to fill standard Automatic Taping and Finishing (ATF) tools. The Tool Fill Kit can remain connected to the pump after installation. CTFIL is not included with the purchase of CTPMP.

description_text: TapeTech Continuous Flow Pump CTPMP TapeTech and Graco have teamed up to offer the Bazooka Continuous Flow System. This ultimate drywall finishing system is designed for high production professional drywall finishers. Increase drywall finishing production up to 75% by eliminating refill trips back to the pump. Reduce fatigue significantly by not having to handle the weight of traditional drywall taping tools filled with mud compound. Powerful pump supplies the mud, saving your muscles! How It Works The Bazooka CFS is powered by a Graco Endurance™ Pump that delivers 1.5 GPM and features the Advantage Drive™ System with long lasting hardened steel gears. The onboard 25 gallon hopper includes an air tight lid that preserves compound overnight, and also acts as a portable wash station. description_text: TapeTech Bazooka Continuous Flow 66" Corner Finisher Handle The Bazooka Continuous Flow Corner Finisher Handles connect to standard TapeTech Corner Finishers to help you finish internal corners (angles) with remarkable speed and quality. The handles can also attach to TapeTech Mud Heads to continuously apply joint compound to inside and outside corners for the installation of paper-faced bead. The new, ergonomic tear-drop handle shape is easier to grip and reduces fatigue. Use with CTVLV for wireless, radio frequency (RF) control of the joint compound flow.

description_hint: TapeTech 07TT EasyClean® Taper is the most advanced and enhanced drywall taping tool offered by TapeTech.
description_text: TapeTech 07TT EasyClean® Taper is the most advanced and enhanced drywall taping tool offered by TapeTech. EasyClean® lid releases with a quick turn of the single attachment screw, and makes clean-up and cable changes easier than ever. You can expect great TapeTech quality from the rest of the drywall gun as well! EASY GRIP CONTROL TUBE . The control tube has been lengthened 2.5" and glide wheels added to make tape cuts easier and more comfortable. The glide wheels are recessed into flanges at each end of the control tube, and act as stops for your hands - requiring much less grip-force to operate the cutter. QUICK-CHANGE TAPE BAIL locks into place, making it easy to change tape rolls without having to put the taper down. Best of all, there are no loose parts to misplace or re-install. To change tape rolls, grasp the tape retainer wire near the end of the spool post and depress it down and out through the retainer slot. Swing the retainer wire up and out of the way, change tape rolls, sliding the new roll fully onto the spool post. Swing the retainer wire back down, and guide it into the retainer slot. It’s that simple! NO HASSLE CABLE CHANGES. The plunger stop has been improved to simplify cable changes. The metal and exposed screw heads have been replaced with a smooth, rounded, plastic plunger stop that is easy to remove and re-install. To remove the plunger stop, lift the locking tab and twist the stop ¼ turn counterclockwise. After twisting, pull the stop off the taper and complete the cable change following the normal procedure (see Cable Replacement). To re-install, align the guide tabs to the slots and slide the stop into the taper end, twisting ¼ turn clockwise. Continue twisting until the tab snaps into place, locking the assembly together. If oriented correctly, very little force should be required to install the stop. Changing a cable has never been easier! NOW WITH ADJUSTABLE BRAKING SYSTEM! This new feature allows you to adjust the braking system for your personal preference. Now you have the control over the brake. It also can be adjusted tighter or looser to account for wear on your taper.

description_hint: TapeTech 15TTE Corner Roller with FHTT Interchangeable Fiberglass Handle is the newest version standard angle roller.
description_text: TapeTech 15TTE Corner Roller with FHTT Interchangeable Fiberglass Handle is the newest version standard angle roller. The 15TTE Corner Roller head incorporates several new design elements that make it easier to clean and operate. The wheels are a departure from the old reversible steel wheels - Replaced with stainless steel roller wheels filled with plastic. The new design washes easier, keeps mud from caking up the wheels, and eliminates stuck wheels. The wheels are attached with a stud design that inhibits wear, and eases friction. Combine the Roller with TapeTech's new FHTT D-Shaped Interchangeable 43" Fiberglass Handle, and you're covered from floor to ceiling. The corner roller drywall tool is used to embed drywall paper tape firmly into the corner in preparation for use with a corner finisher angle head. All TapeTech tools come with an industry-best 5-year limited warranty. Additionally, the tools can be serviced through All-Wall with 2 authorized warranty and repair locations. For over 25 years, TapeTech has served the needs of the drywall industry, producing tools of uncompromising quality, durability and performance. TapeTech’s engineers are continuously designing new tools and improving existing tools to make the job of the finishing professional easier. TapeTech Corner Roller with FHTT Handle Features: Steel Rollers with Plastic Interior provides smooth operation, and are easy to clean Lightweight and fast tool to bed the tape into inside corners forming a sharp corner at the same time. Can embed tape in 10-foot high (3m) corners while standing on the floor. description_text: TapeTech Corner Roller 15TTE The Corner Roller embeds drywall paper tape firmly into the corner, ideal for use immediately after applying joint tape to the internal corner with the Automatic Taper. In preparation for use with a corner finisher, the Corner Roller forces excess joint compound from behind the tape. Featuring a Stainless Steel rollers for durability and clean edges. For best results, Use with the Fiberglass Handle FHTT or the Extension Handle XHTT (sold separately). Features: Steel Rollers with Plastic Interior Provides Smooth Operation. description_text: TapeTech Bazooka Oil - New Larger 8oz Can Specially formulated for lubricating Automatic Taping and Finishing Tools. Bazooka Oil keeps your tools running free, but more importantly this bazooka oil acts as a water barrier that will keep away corrosion, to extend the life of your drywall tools. Avoid the damage to gaskets wipers and O-rings caused by the use of solvent based lubricants such as WD-40. TapeTech Bazooka Oil is the ideal solution for the TapeTech Automatic Taper, Mud Runner, and any other ATF taping tool.
